case_title: MICHAEL YOUNESSIAN VS. MICHAEL JAMES KOONTZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO PLAINTIFF YOUNESSIAN, MICHAEL
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF MICHAEL YOUNESSIAN ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNESSIAN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT KOONTZ, MICHAEL JAMES SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNESSIAN, MICHAEL HEARING SET FOR NOV-07-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNESSIAN, MICHAEL

HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF MICHAEL YOUNESSIAN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. MICHAEL YOUNESSIAN HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: EBURA/DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)
